title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: nmstate bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for nmstate is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: For detailed information on changes in this release, see the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10 Release Notes linked from the References section.
affected_products: Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for ARM 64
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for IBM z Systems
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for Power, little endian

fixes.description: Add support to nmstate for MTU and quickack  [rhel-10]
DNS NNCP is stuck in Degraded state during reconsiliation  [rhel-10.1]
[RFE] Add support in NMSTATE to support FEC [rhel-10]
nmstate fails with OVS bonds:  Bug:Failed to extract interface name and type from connection NmConnection
nmstate nmpolicy capture MAC fails if interface down
Global DNS been discard if installed via OCP assisted intaller mini-iso and full-iso mode
vlan connections created using nmcli could not be removed
Provide validation of OVN Bridge Mapping before applying
[RFE] Match interface by PCI address identifier
While working with  SR-IOV, nmstate could not handle VF's created.
Dispatcher scripts used in linux bonds are not refreshed when changes are made
Ignore desired MAC when bond in MAC restricted mode

full_text:
An update for nmstate is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

For detailed information on changes in this release, see the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10 Release Notes linked from the References section.
